requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — INMETRO Compulsory Certification for EV Charging Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——INMETRO对电动汽车充电设备的强制认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——INMETRO對電動汽車充電設備的強制認證

summary.en: No confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE (Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment) could be verified as of 2026-06-12 — this area is actively evolving. ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 (General requirements for EV conductive charging systems) and ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23 (DC EV charging station) are the applicable Brazilian technical standards for EV chargers. If an INMETRO compulsory Portaria covering EVSE has been issued or comes into force, certification would be administered through an OCP (Organismo de Certificação de Produtos) accredited by INMETRO/CGCRE, with testing by an INMETRO-recognised laboratory (OL). Exporters must verify the current INMETRO portal (portaria.inmetro.gov.br) for any active compulsory Portaria specifically listing EVSE before drawing compliance conclusions.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月12日，未能确认专门针对EVSE（电动汽车供电设备）的INMETRO强制认证方案——该领域正处于积极演变中。ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）和ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23（直流充电站）是巴西充电设备适用的技术标准。如INMETRO已颁布或将颁布涵盖EVSE的强制Portaria，认证将通过经INMETRO/CGCRE认可的OCP（产品认证机构）办理，并由INMETRO认可实验室（OL）出具检测报告。出口商在作出合规结论前，须在INMETRO门户（portaria.inmetro.gov.br）核实是否存在专门列明EVSE的有效强制Portaria。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月12日，未能確認專門針對EVSE（電動汽車供電設備）的INMETRO強制認證方案——該領域正處於積極演變中。ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）和ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23（直流充電站）是巴西充電設備適用的技術標準。如INMETRO已頒布或將頒布涵蓋EVSE的強制Portaria，認證將通過經INMETRO/CGCRE認可的OCP（產品認證機構）辦理，並由INMETRO認可實驗室（OL）出具檢測報告。出口商在作出合規結論前，須在INMETRO門戶（portaria.inmetro.gov.br）核實是否存在專門列明EVSE的有效強制Portaria。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1:2013 (and amendments) — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61851-1)
ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61851-23)

INMETRO Portaria applicable to EV charging infrastructure — compulsory certification requirement (Note: as of 2026-06-12, INMETRO's specific Portaria number for EV chargers should be confirmed at portaria.inmetro.gov.br; this area is subject to regulatory updates)

summary.en: China's equivalent standard is GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically based on IEC 61851-1 but contains national deviations. For DC stations, GB/T 18487.5-2024 applies. Mandatory certification in China is under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA, which became mandatory for EV charging equipment from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024. Chinese CCC or CQC certificates issued under GB/T 18487.1 are NOT recognised under the Brazilian INMETRO conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上以IEC 61851-1为基础，但含有国家偏差。直流充电站适用GB/T 18487.5-2024。中国的强制认证为由CNCA管理的CCC（中国强制认证）制度，自2025年3月1日起依据CNCA-C25-01:2024对充电设备实施强制认证。依据GB/T 18487.1颁发的中国CCC或CQC证书不被巴西INMETRO合格评定路径认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上以IEC 61851-1為基礎，但含有國家偏差。直流充電站適用GB/T 18487.5-2024。中國的強制認證為由CNCA管理的CCC（中國強制認證）制度，自2025年3月1日起依據CNCA-C25-01:2024對充電設備實施強制認證。依據GB/T 18487.1頒發的中國CCC或CQC證書不被巴西INMETRO合格評定路徑認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC; technically based on IEC 61851-1 with national deviations)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system (current DC system standard)
CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC mandatory certification for EV charging equipment (effective 1 March 2025)

gap.en: A confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE could not be verified (as of 2026-06-12; the framework is actively evolving). The applicable technical standards are ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 and NBR IEC 61851-23. If a compulsory Portaria is confirmed, Chinese CCC or GB/T 18487.1 test reports would not be accepted as equivalent under the Brazilian pathway. Key documentation considerations: Portuguese-language product labelling and technical instructions are required regardless of certification scheme status; compliance with ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 is the technical baseline. Exporters should verify the current applicable Portaria at portaria.inmetro.gov.br before initiating market entry, as INMETRO is actively updating its EV-related regulatory framework.
gap.zh: 截至2026年6月12日，专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案尚未得到确认（该框架仍在积极演变中）。适用技术标准为ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1和NBR IEC 61851-23。若强制Portaria获得确认，中国CCC或GB/T 18487.1检测报告在巴西认证路径下将不被接受为等同文件。主要文件注意事项：无论认证方案状态如何，葡萄牙语产品标签和技术说明书均属必要；ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1合规是技术基线。出口商在启动市场准入前，应在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实当前适用的Portaria，因INMETRO正积极更新与电动汽车相关的监管框架。
gap.zht: 截至2026年6月12日，專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案尚未得到確認（該框架仍在積極演變中）。適用技術標準為ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1和NBR IEC 61851-23。若強制Portaria獲得確認，中國CCC或GB/T 18487.1檢測報告在巴西認證路徑下將不被接受為等同文件。主要文件注意事項：無論認證方案狀態如何，葡萄牙語產品標籤和技術說明書均屬必要；ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1合規是技術基線。出口商在啟動市場准入前，應在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實當前適用的Portaria，因INMETRO正積極更新與電動汽車相關的監管框架。

mandatory_status.target: not confirmed compulsory — verify current INMETRO portaria scope; ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196 are the applicable standards but a confirmed compulsory INMETRO certification scheme specifically for EVSE could not be verified as of 2026-06-12
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C25-01:2024 effective 1 March 2025; prior to that date, GB/T 18487.1 compliance enforced under SAMR framework

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNCONFIRMED] No confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE could be verified (framework actively evolving); ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196 are the applicable standards. Exporters must verify the current status of any INMETRO Portaria covering EVSE at portaria.inmetro.gov.br before drawing compliance conclusions. If a compulsory scheme is confirmed, Chinese GB/T 18487.1 or CCC certificates would not satisfy the Brazilian conformity assessment pathway. Product documentation and labelling must be in Portuguese regardless of certification scheme status.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考——未经确认】截至2026年6月12日，未能确认专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案（框架仍在积极演变中）；ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196为适用标准。出口商在作出合规结论前，须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实涵盖EVSE的INMETRO Portaria的当前状态。若强制方案获得确认，中国GB/T 18487.1或CCC证书将不满足巴西合格评定路径。无论认证方案状态如何，产品文件及标签均须为葡萄牙语。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考——未經確認】截至2026年6月12日，未能確認專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案（框架仍在積極演變中）；ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196為適用標準。出口商在作出合規結論前，須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實涵蓋EVSE的INMETRO Portaria的當前狀態。若強制方案獲得確認，中國GB/T 18487.1或CCC證書將不滿足巴西合格評定路徑。無論認證方案狀態如何，產品文件及標籤均須為葡萄牙語。

requirement_topic.en: AC and DC EV Charging System Safety — ABNT NBR IEC 61851 Series
requirement_topic.zh: 交直流电动汽车充电系统安全——ABNT NBR IEC 61851系列
requirement_topic.zht: 交直流電動汽車充電系統安全——ABNT NBR IEC 61851系列

summary.en: ABNT (Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas) adopts IEC standards as Brazilian national standards under the NBR IEC designation. For EV charging equipment, the key standards are ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 (general requirements covering AC Modes 1–3 and DC Mode 4 conductive charging) and ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23 (DC EV charging station requirements). These cover protection against electric shock, insulation coordination, pilot signal and control functions, interlock requirements, temperature ratings, and overcurrent/overvoltage protection. Compliance with these standards is required to obtain INMETRO certification.
summary.zh: ABNT（巴西技术标准协会）以NBR IEC命名采纳IEC标准为巴西国家标准。适用于充电设备的核心标准为ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（涵盖交流模式1–3及直流模式4传导充电的通用要求）和ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23（直流充电站要求）。这些标准涵盖防触电保护、绝缘配合、控制引导信号与控制功能、互锁要求、温度等级及过流/过压保护。符合上述标准是取得INMETRO认证的必要条件。
summary.zht: ABNT（巴西技術標準協會）以NBR IEC命名採納IEC標準為巴西國家標準。適用於充電設備的核心標準為ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（涵蓋交流模式1–3及直流模式4傳導充電的通用要求）和ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23（直流充電站要求）。這些標準涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣配合、控制導引信號與控制功能、互鎖要求、溫度等級及過流/過壓保護。符合上述標準是取得INMETRO認證的必要條件。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1:2013 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61851-1:2010; check ABNT catalogue for any updated edition)
ABNT NBR IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (Brazilian adoption; check ABNT catalogue for edition year)

summary.en: China's GB/T 18487.1-2015 corresponds to IEC 61851-1 (the same IEC base standard adopted by ABNT as NBR IEC 61851-1), but with Chinese national deviations recorded in the standard. The technical content overlaps substantially, but test reports issued under GB/T 18487.1 by Chinese CNAS labs are not accepted as substitutes for INMETRO-scheme testing under ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1. The specific Chinese deviations must be assessed against Brazilian requirements; where deviations apply, additional testing may be required.
summary.zh: 中国的GB/T 18487.1-2015对应IEC 61851-1（与ABNT采纳为NBR IEC 61851-1的IEC基础标准相同），但包含已记录的中国国家偏差。技术内容存在大量重叠，但中国CNAS实验室依据GB/T 18487.1颁发的检测报告不被接受作为ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1项下INMETRO体系检测的替代文件。须评估具体中国偏差与巴西要求之间的差异；如存在偏差，可能需要补充测试。
summary.zht: 中國的GB/T 18487.1-2015對應IEC 61851-1（與ABNT採納為NBR IEC 61851-1的IEC基礎標準相同），但包含已記錄的中國國家偏差。技術內容存在大量重疊，但中國CNAS實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1頒發的檢測報告不被接受作為ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1項下INMETRO體系檢測的替代文件。須評估具體中國偏差與巴西要求之間的差異；如存在偏差，可能需要補充測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (based on IEC 61851-1:2010 with national deviations)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system (current DC standard)

gap.en: Although both GB/T 18487.1 and ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 are derived from the same IEC 61851-1 base, the key gap is the certification pathway, not the technical standard content. Testing must be performed by an INMETRO-recognised OL laboratory and certification issued by an INMETRO-accredited OCP. Additional attention is needed for: (1) Brazilian grid voltage/frequency characteristics (220 V / 127 V, 60 Hz — different from China's 220 V, 50 Hz); (2) specific connector type requirements (see evbr-connector); (3) Portuguese documentation requirements. Chinese GB/T test reports may be used as supporting data in some OCP processes but cannot replace INMETRO-scheme test reports.
gap.zh: 尽管GB/T 18487.1与ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1均源自同一IEC 61851-1基础，但主要差距在于认证路径而非技术标准内容。检测须由INMETRO认可的OL实验室完成，认证须由INMETRO认可的OCP颁发。还需特别关注：（1）巴西电网电压/频率特性（220V/127V，60Hz——与中国220V、50Hz不同）；（2）特定连接器类型要求（见evbr-connector）；（3）葡萄牙语文件要求。在部分OCP程序中，中国GB/T检测报告可作为辅助数据提交，但不能替代INMETRO体系检测报告。
gap.zht: 儘管GB/T 18487.1與ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1均源自同一IEC 61851-1基礎，但主要差距在於認證路徑而非技術標準內容。檢測須由INMETRO認可的OL實驗室完成，認證須由INMETRO認可的OCP頒發。還需特別關注：（1）巴西電網電壓/頻率特性（220V/127V，60Hz——與中國220V、50Hz不同）；（2）特定連接器類型要求（見evbr-connector）；（3）葡萄牙語文件要求。在部分OCP程序中，中國GB/T檢測報告可作為輔助數據提交，但不能替代INMETRO體系檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 / 61851-23 are the applicable Brazilian technical standards for EV chargers; whether a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE exists must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br — not confirmed compulsory as of 2026-06-12
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.1-2015 compliance required; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

source.publisher: ABNT — Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1 (and NBR IEC 61851-23 for DC) are the applicable safety standards for EV charging equipment in Brazil. Whether a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE is in force must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br — this could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-12. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 shares the same IEC root but differs in national deviations. Brazilian 60 Hz grid frequency (vs. China 50 Hz) is a hardware consideration that must be verified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（直流设备另需NBR IEC 61851-23）是巴西充电设备适用的安全标准。专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案是否有效实施，须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实——截至2026年6月12日未能确认。中国GB/T 18487.1与其共享相同的IEC根源，但在国家偏差方面存在差异。巴西60Hz电网频率（与中国50Hz不同）是须核实的硬件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ABNT NBR IEC 61851-1（直流設備另需NBR IEC 61851-23）是巴西充電設備適用的安全標準。專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案是否有效實施，須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實——截至2026年6月12日未能確認。中國GB/T 18487.1與其共享相同的IEC根源，但在國家偏差方面存在差異。巴西60Hz電網頻率（與中國50Hz不同）是須核實的硬體要求。
